description: Create a new SLD style named 'river_labels' in the 'ne' workspace for the Natural Earth Rivers layer ('ne:ne_rivers'). The style must use a TextSymbolizer with the 'name' attribute and include the VendorOptions 'group' and 'followLine'. Apply this new style as the default style for the 'ne:ne_rivers' layer. The GeoServer admin interface is at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (Login: admin / Admin123!).
